title: Audit and fix congress left pane purpose

log.context: Audit and fix congress left pane purpose

Done. Here's a summary of what was changed:

**Root cause:** Both the left pane and the debate circle read from the same `seats` array. When a session loads, `seats` gets filtered down to only that session's debaters — so both panes showed the same filtered set.

**Fix in `/mnt/data/hello-world/congress.html`:**

1. **New state:** `allActivePersonas` — populated at init from `/api/agents` (all non-moderator actives, no slice). Never mutated by session loading. `sessionParticipantIds` — a `Set` o...(truncated)
